c.d: Effectiveness of the shuffle algorithm to ensure all songs are played in a true random or intelligent non-repetitive order
c.s: Google Play Store, Spotify, User Forums

c.d: Ability to create, edit, and manage multiple playlists with support for folders, filters, and linked playlists
Support for multiple music sources and streaming services, including cloud storage and YouTube integration
Responsive design that adapts well to different devices such as phones and tablets
Number of downloads and user ratings as indicators of popularity and user satisfaction
